Royalty au!

So this AU is where leafy after stealing dream island, let everyone onto the island but she made herself the queen on the island.

Appearance:

This dress has a whimsical, fairy-tale style with strong “princess” and cottagecore influences. It looks like a formal or costume-inspired dress designed with a lot of romantic detail.

Soft pastel shades of cream, ivory, and pale sage green. The green has a delicate shimmer that gives the skirt a magical, ethereal feel.

The top is fitted like a corset, with lace-up detailing in the center and delicate lace trim along the neckline and straps. The upper chest area is ruched cream fabric, giving it a vintage, elegant look.

Thin lace straps with scalloped lace edging create a delicate, feminine appearance.

A large oversized bow sits at the waist in pale green fabric. It’s decorated with white fabric roses and draped pearl strands, making it very ornate and decorative.

The skirt is short in the front with layered, asymmetrical panels that cascade softly. The fabric has volume and structure, creating a puffed silhouette similar to a ball gown or lolita fashion dress.

The back extends slightly longer than the front, almost like a mini high-low gown.

Leafy has tan skin, green long hair, dark and round eyes, skinny, and a white crown.
